extDesc.message: See any store's return policy in one click, summarized on-device. No login, nothing leaves your browser.

couldNotRead.message: Couldn't read the return policy page. Open it directly below.

noPolicyFound.message: Couldn't find a return policy link on this page.

noPolicyInText.message: That page didn't appear to contain a return policy. Showing the page text so you can check.

aiUnavailable.message: On-device AI isn't available, so here's the return policy text instead.

cannotRunHere.message: This page can't be analyzed. Open a store page and try again.

errorGeneric.message: Something went wrong. Please try again.

privacyNote.message: Summarized on your device. Nothing leaves your browser.

aboutTagline.message: See any store's return policy in one click.

aboutPrivacy.message: Privacy-first: policies are summarized on your device by Chrome's built-in AI. Nothing you browse leaves your browser.

aboutNoBackend.message: No backend, no accounts, no tracking — there are no servers and no analytics behind this extension.

aboutLanguages.message: Works in English, Spanish, and French.

aboutOnDevice.message: Free and instant — summaries are cached locally for repeat visits.

aboutOpenSource.message: Open source, so anyone can inspect exactly what it does.

checkingReviews.message: Checking Trustpilot reviews… (a tab may open briefly)

reviewsCount.message: Based on $count$ Trustpilot review(s) mentioning returns

reviewsNoProfile.message: No public Trustpilot reviews found for this store.

reviewsNoReturns.message: No reviews specifically about returns or refunds were found.

reviewsError.message: Couldn't load reviews right now. Please try again later.

reviewsPrivacyNote.message: Reads the store's public Trustpilot page — only when you tap this.
